description: Parameterized queries were replaced with string interpolation introducing SQL injection. A new search endpoint also uses interpolation. The soft-delete route lost its parameterization.

issues.summary: SQL injection: userId interpolated into SELECT WHERE clause. Was parameterized ($1) before this diff.
SQL injection in search: q and role concatenated into SELECT WHERE/LIKE clause. User-controlled.
SQL injection via role filter — second injection point in the same handler.
SQL injection in DELETE: userId interpolated into UPDATE. Was parameterized before this diff — regression.
Log injection: raw user input q and role logged without sanitization.
